tools.name: getStaysByWiFiSpeed
tools.description: Search for stays with minimum WiFi download speed (Mbps). Returns stays with WiFi speeds above the specified threshold.

tools.name: getStaysByCountry
tools.description: Search for nomad stays in a specific country by 2-letter country code or partial country name

tools.name: getStaysByContinent
tools.description: Search for nomad stays by continent

tools.name: getStayByID
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific stay by its ID

tools.name: getStaysByLocation
tools.description: Search for stays by location (city/region name)

tools.name: getStaysByLifestyle
tools.description: Search for stays by lifestyle/genre category

tools.name: getStaysByBudget
tools.description: Search for stays within a budget and duration. Country is optional - searches globally if not specified.

tools.name: getStaysByAmenities
tools.description: Find stays that include specific amenities across stay- and room-level facilities. Supports 'any' or 'all' matching and optional WiFi speed filter.

tools.name: getAllAmenities
tools.description: List all possible amenities grouped into Stay vs Room (database-wide)

tools.name: checkStayAvailability
tools.description: Check if a specific stay is available for given check-in and check-out dates

tools.name: findNearestAvailability
tools.description: Find the nearest available dates when requested dates are not available

tools.name: getAvailabilityByMonth
tools.description: Get all available booking windows in a specific month

tools.name: getRoomAvailability
tools.description: Check which specific rooms at a stay are available for given dates

tools.name: getRoomAmenities
tools.description: Get comprehensive list of all facilities and amenities for a specific room
